case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EDWIN YOVANI CONTRERAS MORALES

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS MORALES, EDWIN YOVANI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS MORALES, EDWIN YOVANI
